scripts.supabase:types: supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public | tail -n +2 > packages/db/src/database.types.ts
scripts.test:apps-api-core: tsx --test apps/api/src/domain-analysis-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/promotion-edge-integration.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/submission-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/settlement-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/golden-regression.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/clv-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/grading-service.test.ts
scripts.test:apps-api-agent: tsx --test apps/api/src/grading-cron.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/recap-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/alert-agent-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/alert-agent.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/hedge-detection-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/hedge-notification-service.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/server.test.ts && tsx --test apps/api/src/http-integration.test.ts
scripts.test:apps-rest: tsx --test apps/ingestor/src/ingestor.test.ts && tsx --test apps/worker/src/worker-runtime.test.ts && tsx --test apps/operator-web/src/server.test.ts && tsx --test apps/discord-bot/src/discord-bot-foundation.test.ts && tsx --test apps/discord-bot/src/member-tier-sync.test.ts && tsx --test packages/db/src/member-tier-repository.test.ts
scripts.test:apps: pnpm test:apps-api-core && pnpm test:apps-api-agent && pnpm test:apps-rest
scripts.test: pnpm test:apps && pnpm test:verification && pnpm test:domain-probability && pnpm test:domain-features && pnpm test:domain-signals && pnpm test:domain-hedge && pnpm test:domain-analytics
scripts.verify: pnpm env:check && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @unit-talk/smart-form verify
